description_long: This is a small, decorative wooden pedestrian bridge with a gently arched deck and prominent railings on both sides. The bridge features four sturdy square posts at each corner, each topped with a darker cap, providing both structural support and visual accent. The railings consist of evenly spaced vertical balusters and a curved top rail, enhancing safety and aesthetics. The deck is composed of parallel wooden planks, slightly elevated in the center to form a smooth arch. The wood appears to be finished with a warm, reddish-brown stain, giving the bridge a polished and inviting look. This type of bridge is commonly found in parks, gardens, or urban green spaces, serving both functional and ornamental purposes.
description: A small, arched wooden pedestrian bridge with decorative railings and capped posts, finished in a warm reddish-brown stain.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the arched deck, four capped posts, and the full length of the curved railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the width of the bridge, the parallel deck planks, and the spacing between the posts.
description_view_2: Rear angled view mirroring the front, displaying the arch, capped posts, and railing symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bridge's width, deck planks, and the structure of the posts and railings.
attribute_railing_design: wooden railings with vertical balusters and curved top rails, capped square posts
